name: Gaiser Park
description: Gaiser Park is a place to play pickleball in Seymour, IN. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Police Citizens Youth Clubs
description: Police Citizens Youth Clubs is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Seymour, IN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are private.
hours: Sun 4pm-Late More info Nominations now open individual Futsal registration $25 per person must be a club member. Email orange@pcycnsw.org.au for a nomination sheet.
